RuleSet.Name: BuildSchemaRamLoader-wsl.bash
RuleSet.GenFile: #!/bin/bash $MssBashScriptLicense$ Revision=$$1 MAJOR_VERSION=$reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer Name$ MINOR_VERSION=$reference MinorVersion Name$ rm -f $lower SchemaName$ramloader*.gz *.deb *.build *.dsc *.log *.changes ex.cmd pushd $lower SchemaName$ramloader if [ -f Makefile ]; then make distclean fi popd$fileBuildSchemaRamLoaderBashPart2$
RuleSet.GenRule: pushd $lower SchemaName$ramloader if [ ! -d /usr/bin/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$ ]; then sudo mkdir /usr/include/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$ fi sudo chmod 755 /usr/bin/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$ if [ ! -d /usr/bin/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$/$${MAJOR_VERSION}.0.$${MINOR_VERSION} ]; then sudo mkdir /usr/include/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$/$${MAJOR_VERSION}.0.$${MINOR_VERSION} fi sudo chmod 755 /usr/bin/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$/$${MAJOR_VERSION}.0.$${MINOR_VERSION} autoreconf -fi aclocal autoconf automake ./configure --prefix=/usr --disable-static CFLAGS='-g3 -Og -D_DEBUG' CXXFLAGS='-g3 -Og -D_DEBUG -std=c++2a -I/usr/include/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$/$${MAJOR_VERSION).0.$${MINOR_VERSION} -I/usr/include/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$/$${MAJOR_VERSION).0.$${MINOR_VERSION} ' #./configure --prefix=/usr --disable-static CFLAGS='-O2 -DNDEBUG' CXXFLAGS='-O2 -DNDEBUG -std=c++2a -I/usr/include/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$/$${MAJOR_VERSION).0.$${MINOR_VERSION} -I/usr/include/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$/$${MAJOR_VERSION).0.$${MINOR_VERSION} ' make clean time make sudo make install sudo rm -Rf /usr/include/$lower SchemaName$* sudo chmod 755 /usr/bin/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$ sudo chmod 755 /usr/bin/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$/$${MAJOR_VERSION}.0.$${MINOR_VERSION} sudo chmod 755 /usr/bin/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$/$${MAJOR_VERSION}.0.$${MINOR_VERSION}/$lower SchemaName$ramloader sudo ldconfig popd
